title: acianthus cuneatus
intro: Acianthus cuneatus, also known as the New Zealand native orchid or "yellow helmet orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acianthus cuneatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Acianthus cuneatus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to support overall health and well-being.
